meaning: n.海军校生,(=middy blouse)妇女或儿童穿的水手领罩衫
examples: She changed her traveling clothes for a simple long skirt and white middy blouse.
By the middy, clouds came out and the sun hid.
Nora was very puzzled as she changed her traveling clothes for a simple long skirt and white middy blouse and rewound her long chestnut braid around her head.
